zh.lifeSummary: 當Magnus Olafsson III Berrføtt於1073年出生在挪威時，他的父親King Olav III Haraldsson Kyrre of Norway23歲，母親Thora Arnesdatter of Låge24歲。他與Sigrid Saksesdatter Queen of Norway結婚。他去世於1103年8月24日在愛爾蘭庫迪 唐享年30歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 唐。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Magnus Olafsson III Berrføtt于1073年出生在挪威时，他的父亲King Olav III Haraldsson Kyrre of Norway23岁，母亲Thora Arnesdatter of Låge24岁。他与Sigrid Saksesdatter Queen of Norway结婚。他去世于1103年8月24日在爱尔兰庫迪 唐享年30岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 唐。

nameMeanings.name: Olafsson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Nels.
Americanized form of Norwegian and Danish Olafsen or of its very rare Swedish cognate Olafsson.

variants.name: Olafsen
meanings: Norwegian and Danish: patronymic from the personal name Olaf, from Old Norse Óláfr, Ólafr, variant Óleifr, earlier Anleifr, from proto-Scandinavian elements meaning ‘ancestor’ + ‘heir, descendant’. Olaf (also Olav, in Sweden Olof) has always been one of the most common Scandinavian names; it continued to be popular in the Middle Ages, in part as a result of the fame of Saint Olaf, King of Norway, who brought Christianity to his country c. 1030. This surname is rare in Denmark. Compare Olafson .

nameMeanings.name: Magnus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Latin byname meaning ‘great’, this was first extracted from the name of Charlemagne (recorded in Latin chronicles as Carolus Magnus ‘Charles the Great’) and used as a given name by the Scandinavians. It was borne by seven medieval kings of Norway, including Magnus I ( 1024–47 ), known as Magnus the Good, and Magnus VI ( 1238–80 ), known as Magnus the Law Mender. There are several early Scandinavian saints called Magnus, including an earl of Orkney ( d. 1116 ), to whom Kirkwall cathedral is dedicated. The name was imported to Scotland and Ireland during the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Magnus Olafsson III Berrføtt was born in 1073, in Norway, his father, King Olav III Haraldsson Kyrre of Norway, was 23 and his mother, Thora Arnesdatter of Låge, was 24. He married Sigrid Saksesdatter Queen of Norway. He died on 24 August 1103, in County Down, Ireland, at the age of 30, and was buried in County Down, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Magnus Olafsson III Berrføtt est né en 1073, à Norvège, son père, King Olav III Haraldsson Kyrre of Norway, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Thora Arnesdatter of Låge, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Sigrid Saksesdatter Queen of Norway. Il est décédé le 24 août 1103, à County Down, Irlande, à l’âge de 30 ans, et a été enterré à County Down, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Magnus Olafsson III Berrføtt 1073 in Norwegen geboren wurde, war sein Vater King Olav III Haraldsson Kyrre of Norway 23 und seine Mutter Thora Arnesdatter of Låge 24. Er hat Sigrid Saksesdatter Queen of Norway geheiratet. Er starb am 24. August 1103 im Alter von 30 Jahren in County Down, Irland und wurde in County Down, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Magnus Olafsson III Berrføtt è nato il nel 1073 nel Norvegia, il suo padre, King Olav III Haraldsson Kyrre of Norway, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Thora Arnesdatter of Låge, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Sigrid Saksesdatter Queen of Norway. Morì il 24 agosto 1103, nel County Down, Irlanda, all'età di 30 anni, e fu sepolto a County Down, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Magnus Olafsson III Berrføttが1073年にノルウェーで生まれた時，父King Olav III Haraldsson Kyrre of Norwayは23歳，母Thora Arnesdatter of Lågeは24歳であった。Sigrid Saksesdatter Queen of Norwayと結婚した。彼は1103年8月24日にアイルランドコウントイ ダウンで30歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ ダウンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Magnus Olafsson III Berrføtt(이)가 1073년 노르웨이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 King Olav III Haraldsson Kyrre of Norway(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Thora Arnesdatter of Låge(은)는 24세였다. 그는 Sigrid Saksesdatter Queen of Norway(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1103년 8월 24일 아일랜드 카운티 다운에서 30세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 다운에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Magnus Olafsson III Berrføtt nasceu em 1073, em Noruega, seu pai, King Olav III Haraldsson Kyrre of Norway, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Thora Arnesdatter of Låge, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Sigrid Saksesdatter Queen of Norway. Ele faleceu em 24 de agosto de 1103, em County Down, Irlanda, com 30 anos, e foi sepultado em County Down, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Magnus Olafsson III Berrføtt родился в 1073 г. в местности Норвегия, его отцу по имени King Olav III Haraldsson Kyrre of Norway было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Thora Arnesdatter of Låge, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Sigrid Saksesdatter Queen of Norway. Он умер 24 августа 1103 г. в местности коунти доун, Ирландия в возрасте 30 лет и был похоронен в местности коунти доун, Ирландия.

sm.1091-1102: mai le 1091 e o'o I le 1102

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Magnus Olafsson III Berrføtt nació en 1073, en Noruega, su papá, King Olav III Haraldsson Kyrre of Norway, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Thora Arnesdatter of Låge, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Sigrid Saksesdatter Queen of Norway. Murió el 24 de agosto de 1103, en County Down, Irlanda, a la edad de 30 años, y fue sepultado en County Down, Irlanda.
